title: 4 Paper and Related Products Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Challenges
text: The Zacks Paper and Related Products industry's prospects look dull, as low consumer spending is impacting demand. Despite this, stocks like SUZ, IP, KLBAY and SLVM are well-poised to gain from their growth initiatives.

title: Computerworld names International Paper to 2024 list of Best Places to Work in IT
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn. , Nov. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Foundry's Computerworld (http://www.computerworld.com) announces International Paper as a 2024 Best Places to Work in IT.

title: Got $5,000? Buy and Hold These 3 Value Stocks for Years
text: Prudential Financial stands to benefit as interest rates stabilize. International Paper could see some disproportionate growth thanks to a shift from plastic to paper.

title: International Paper (IP) Down 11% in a Year: Will It Recover?
text: International Paper's (IP) price performance has been reflecting declines in prices and volumes due to lower consumer spending, as well as higher costs.
